_comment: Twin-template registry. Each pair shares a visual contract; editing one side must edit the other in the same PR (enforced by tools/docs/check_template_twins.py per ADR-0035 D5). Paths are repo-relative starting with 'services/'. Adding a new pair: list its two entries under 'pages' (with stable ids) and add the id-pair under 'pairs'. The same registry is the basis of the future BL-047 visual-regression baseline corpus.
